money_flow_summary: Companies pay for data to make better decisions. Public data is abundant; AI extracts signal from noise at near-zero cost, enabling solo operators to build proprietary data products that previously required analyst teams.

opportunities.title: Job Market Signals API (Hiring as Leading Indicator)
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Scrape LinkedIn/Indeed/Greenhouse job postings daily for 50k+ companies. Detect signals: surge in hires (growth), sudden freeze (trouble), new titles (emerging trends). Sell API to VCs, hedge funds, recruiters at $299–$2,999/mo.
opportunities.moat: 12+ months historical hiring data creates unique trend analysis
opportunities.first_step: Build LinkedIn job scraper or use SerpAPI; create 'company hiring velocity' metric; produce free weekly Substack for VCs
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI categorizes job descriptions by function, seniority, and tech stack — turning 50k unstructured postings into structured intelligence daily

competitors.name: LinkedIn Talent Insights
competitors.weakness: $1,000+/mo; enterprise only; aggregated data, no company-level hiring velocity; no API

competitors.name: Thinknum
competitors.weakness: $25k+/yr; enterprise; broad alternative data, not hiring-specific intelligence

competitors.name: Revelio Labs
competitors.weakness: Academic/enterprise; expensive; not accessible to indie investors or recruiters

opportunities.gap: VCs and hedge funds pay $25k+/yr for alternative data on company hiring signals. A $299–$999/mo API that delivers the same intelligence is a 50–100x price disruption.
poc_steps: Use SerpAPI or Apify to scrape Indeed job count per company daily ($0.005/page)
Build simple dashboard showing hiring acceleration/deceleration
DM 10 VCs on Twitter: 'I built a tool that tracks hiring signals before earnings — want access?'

opportunities.title: Automated Competitive Intelligence Briefing
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Monitor competitor websites, pricing, changelogs, job posts, G2 reviews. LLM synthesizes weekly 1-page brief. Sell $299–$999/mo to B2B SaaS with 3–20 competitors.
opportunities.moat: Historical competitive changelog creates institutional memory; Slack integration creates workflow dependency
opportunities.first_step: Build Playwright scraper for competitor pricing pages + ChangeDetection.io webhook; set up LLM brief generator; demo to 3 SaaS founders
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI connects pricing changes + new job postings + product announcements to infer strategic shifts

competitors.name: Crayon
competitors.weakness: $15k–$50k/yr; enterprise only; complex; requires dedicated CI analyst to use effectively

competitors.name: Klue
competitors.weakness: $15k–$30k+/yr; enterprise battlecard tool; not automated intelligence gathering

competitors.name: Kompyte (by Semrush)
competitors.weakness: Semrush add-on; $2k+/yr; limited depth; not developer-accessible; UI-only

opportunities.gap: Crayon and Klue are $15k–$50k/yr enterprise tools. A $299/mo tool that automatically monitors competitors and sends a weekly AI-written brief is a 30–100x price disruption.
poc_steps: Set up ChangeDetection.io (free) to monitor 5 competitor pricing pages
When changes detected, send to Claude with prompt: 'explain what changed and what it means strategically'
Email the brief to 1 test customer every Monday
Charge $299/mo after 4 weeks of proving value
